name: Lady Aimes Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, corn syrup, evaporated milk, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium-high until it reaches 265°F to 270°F on an instant-read thermometer (hard ball stage).
3. Add butter, flavoring, chopped nuts, raisins, and coconut to the mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into a well-buttered baking dish or pan.
5. Allow the toffee to cool completely until it is firm enough to handle.
6. Using a sharp knife, cut the cooled toffee into long, narrow bars.
Note: Blanch E. McGlo
